meta.title: 7dawn · The Self-Evolving Industrial AI Engineer
meta.description: 7dawn makes AI do real engineering on the factory floor — from concept design to multiphysics validation to manufacturing. 3Studio is the AI engineering workspace for high-end manufacturing teams.

hero.label: // 7DAWN · SINGULARITY DAWN
hero.sub: From concept design to multiphysics validation to manufacturing — gets smarter the more you use it.

leak.note: Aerospace test-matrix scenario · internal baseline, not a global promise

physics.note: Structural / thermal / fluid / EM / electronics / control

problem.titleLine1: Industrial R&D is slow and costly ——
problem.titleEm: costlier still is the design you never got to make
problem.lead: It is not a missing AI feature, but a missing AI that does real engineering on the floor and can be trusted. A complex design crosses 10+ tools, validation runs for weeks, and rework eats a large share of the schedule.

0.body: CAD / CAE / EDA / simulation / standards — engineers shuttle data by hand across a dozen windows.

1.body: “Which boundary does this parameter touch” lives only in a senior chief engineer’s head; people leave, knowledge scatters.

2.body: Structural, thermal and EM all couple; cross-discipline impact travels via meetings, and rework stays high.

3.body: Hundreds to thousands of test items per model — configure, run, compare, write reports, one by one.

4.h4: No room to explore better designs
4.body: All the time goes to running process; the better configurations that would actually win never get tried.

5.body: Aerospace / high-end manufacturing — the cost of error is extreme; AI must be auditable, explainable, reversible.

problem.whyNow: Why now: models moved from answering to executing, industrial software is going AI-native, and policy is actively pushing industrial agents — the window is opening.

products.lead: An aerospace-grade AI engineering workspace for high-end manufacturing teams.

studio.name: 3Studio
studio.desc: Let engineering teams run design, verification, flow and operations with an agent crew, fully governed and auditable.

capability.titleEm: across the whole industrial design flow
capability.lead: Stages run across; multiphysics disciplines run down — every sub-domain has different tools and people, and we unify them on one foundation. That is the structural difference from point tools (Ansys / MATLAB).
capability.governance: Governance built in: tool allow-list · full-chain audit · one-click rollback · tiered approval (human-in-the-loop).

evolution.titleBefore: Smarter the more you use it ——
evolution.lead: Every human review and every agent run feeds the knowledge engine: M0 instant memory → M1 project memory → M2 organizational memory, plus end-to-end RL, so the agent learns your engineering the more you use it.
evolution.future: The endgame is a “smarter the more you use it” flywheel on the factory floor — more use, thicker engineering data, stronger models. (Capability evolves with deployment.)

0.v: Context and skills captured within a single session.

1.v: Experience reused across tasks within one program.

2.v: Tacit organizational knowledge structured and transferred across projects.

3.v: Rewarded by real engineering outcomes, closing the loop to keep self-iterating.

industries.lead: Prove it first in the hardest, most homologous aerospace domain, then replicate along the capability axis to more industries.

0.name: Commercial space · launch & satellite
0.pain: Aero / structural / thermal multiphysics is simulation-heavy; iteration is slow and costly.
0.land: Speed up concept-to-validation across the flow with coupled multiphysics.
0.expand: Prove the template → replicate to more commercial-space customers.

1.name: eVTOL · low-altitude economy
1.pain: New airframes iterate fast; whole-aircraft simulation demand is high; airworthiness pressure is heavy.
1.land: Rapid configuration iteration plus whole-aircraft multiphysics validation.
1.expand: A national-strategy tailwind with strong demand.

2.name: State-machinery manufacturing
2.pain: Heavy equipment / precision manufacturing; a long design-to-make chain.
2.expand: Enter the vast manufacturing base via industrial-software partnerships.

company.vision: Others build tools; we build an industrial engine that evolves itself. Starting from the rocket-and-satellite proving ground, we connect design → validation → manufacturing into a closed loop.
company.gene: A team combining Tsinghua-rooted AI, aerospace engineering, and EDA commercialization backgrounds.
company.market: From the proving ground to a trillion-scale industrial design market — deep on the capability axis, wide on the industry axis.

cta.lead: High-end manufacturing teams are welcome to reach out — we work closely with you on requirements and delivery.
cta.subject: 7dawn · 3Studio enquiry

foot.industry: Industry pack: Commercial Space · multiphysics toolchain
